output.summary: Fixed DynamicContentCarousel.css to contain ONLY the equal-height card chain rule as specified in the plan. Removed duplicate card hover zoom styles and redundant prefers-reduced-motion override.

fixesApplied.description: DynamicContentCarousel.css contained duplicate card hover zoom styles (lines 6-23) that were already handled generically in body.css
fixesApplied.fix: Removed lines 6-23 from DynamicContentCarousel.css. File now contains only the equal-height card chain rule: .dynamic-content-carousel .swiper-slide > * { height: 100%; }
fixesApplied.verification: Build passes. Generic card hover zoom in body.css handles all card-post and card-team-member hover effects theme-wide.

fixesApplied.description: Block-scoped prefers-reduced-motion override in DynamicContentCarousel.css was redundant
fixesApplied.fix: Removed @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block (lines 17-23). Theme-wide blanket rule in body.css already handles all transitions/animations.
fixesApplied.verification: Build passes. No reduced-motion handling needed at block level.

filesModified.before: 24 lines - contained equal-height rule, card hover zoom styles, and prefers-reduced-motion override
filesModified.after: 4 lines - contains ONLY equal-height card chain rule
filesModified.changes: Removed lines 6-23 (card hover zoom transition, hover scale, and prefers-reduced-motion block). Retained only the block-specific equal-height rule per the original plan.

warnings: webpack performance warnings (bundle size) - pre-existing, not related to CSS changes

verificationNotes: DynamicContentCarousel.css now matches the planning spec exactly: one rule, one purpose
Card hover zoom is handled globally via body.css (.card-post img, .card-team-member img)
Prefers-reduced-motion is handled theme-wide via body.css blanket rule
No CSS duplication in compiled output
Build passes with no new errors or warnings
